rows.label: xs33510100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Oh, finally found you.
I'm glad to see we're both in one piece.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33510100_MSG0020
rows.name:
Honestly, dividing our forces like that,
he sure pulled a sneaky trick.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33510100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I won't be satisfied unless I pay this debt back
a thousand times over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33510100_MSG0040
rows.name:
Come on, let's get moving.
We've got a phantom wannabe to send flying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33510100_MSG0050
rows.name:
We are settling this for good this time.
With our own hands[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
